CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET
PAGE 02
1
Riya's town had no college with a real BBA.
Do I have to move away?
2
Leaving home for a distant hostel felt daunting.
So far from my family?
3
Then she found a recognised BBA she could do online.
College, from my own room!
4
Now she studies at home, her degree on track.
No move, a full degree.

Why An Online BBA Just Works

  • 1
    Study 100% online, anytime, from your phone or laptop. No campus, no commute.
  • 2
    The same UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ BBA as on-campus, recognised everywhere.
  • 3
    Just ₹45,000/year with 0% interest EMI, or 15% off on upfront payment.
  • 4
    Weekend live classes plus recordings, so learning fits around your life.
